urdu transliteration text:
Zainab Lipat ke roi, Abbas key Nishan seZainab held the Alam of Abbas and wept  English Transliteration
@HujjatELC

english translation text: Where will I find such an honourable brother again

You will not hear a single complaint or mention about water again
Where will I find such an honourable brother again

urdu transliteration text:
Sher Ali ka laasha, Shabbir leke aayeDhundhegi ab sakina, bazoo kahaan se,Aisa Ghayur bhaiya, Laaungi phir kahan se
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Shabbir (a.s.) has brought the body of Abbas,
Where will Sakina look for his arms,
where will I find such an honourable brother again

urdu transliteration text:
Bhule nahi zamana, taseer-e-binte ZehraGhairat tarap rahi thi Abbas key nishaa seAisa Ghayur bhaiya, Laaungi phir kahan se
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
We should not forget the impact that the daughter of Zahra (s.a.) had,
Honour herself was weeping at the Alam of Abbas,
Where will I find such an honourable brother again

urdu transliteration text:
Qamare Ali ka laasha, us waqt tarap gayaa thabandha jo zaalimo ney, Zainab ko rismaa seAisa Ghayur bhaiya, Laaungi phir kahan se
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The body of Abbas trembled when the enemies tied Zainab’s hands with ropes,
Where will I find such an honourable brother again
